MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER GREG LINDBERG , AND INDIVIDUAL Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Enforce Subpoena Pursuant To Ccp 2029.600 Et Seq.

The court denies the petition without prejudice, without reaching its merits.

*SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS*

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
